# Code Anchors: Nexus Pipeline

- `.claude/commands/nxs.setup.md` — the setup stage: bootstrap ground truth and product context.
- `.claude/commands/nxs.epic.md` — the epic stage: intent to right-sized epic and filed stories, committing nothing at planning; the epic is later resolved from its issue number.
- `.claude/commands/nxs.hld.md` — the high-level-design stage: the focused decision record, and the --from import that seeds it from an out-of-band design doc; now obtains the epic through the resolver.
- `.claude/commands/nxs.analyze.md` — the analyze stage: implementation-conformance gate reading committed scratch as soft context, with a --pr mode; now obtains the epic through the resolver.
- `.claude/commands/nxs.close.md` — the close stage: close record into the queue and issue closure, with a --pr post-merge mode; materializes the born-at-close queue entry.
